design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate vertically scrolling stages while dodging enemy fire and destroying waves of enemies with persistent weapon upgrades
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Managing screen saturation with enemy projectiles while maintaining offensive coverage
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Piloting an advanced fighter jet through overwhelming enemy formations with escalating firepower
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasizes persistent weapon upgrade mechanics that carry across stages, rewarding player progression and encouraging repeated engagement with core shooting loop

difficulty.continues_system: Continue functionality available after game over
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based checkpointing; progression resets on continue
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Weapon upgrade selection and collection provides tactical depth and difficulty scaling through resource management

progression.upgrade_system: Persistent weapon power-ups collected during stages; upgrades carry between levels and accumulate across playthrough
progression.unlock_mechanism: Stages unlocked sequentially; access to later content gated by completing previous stages
replayability_hooks: Different upgrade paths create varied playstyles
Score chasing on fixed stage layouts
Difficulty scaling through upgrade choices encourages replay for optimization

world_building_techniques: Environmental theming through stage hazards and enemy types
Implicit military conflict conveyed through enemy formations and battlefield aesthetics

faction_indicators: Player vs. unified enemy force structure
Hierarchical enemy waves suggesting organized military opposition
danger_signals: Escalating enemy density indicating territorial consolidation
Boss encounters marking key strategic positions
environmental_storytelling: Stage theming progression (urban to industrial to command centers)
Enemy type variation by region suggests distributed occupation
